headline: Pernod Ricard Weighs Brown Forman Deal As Valuation Gap Widens
summary: Pernod Ricard is reported to be in early-stage acquisition talks with Brown-Forman regarding a potential large scale spirits deal. The discussions, which are still at an exploratory stage, could bring together leading brands across whisky, bourbon and tequila under one group. No binding agreement has been announced and key terms, including structure and valuation, have not been disclosed. Pernod Ricard, listed as ENXTPA:RI, is entering these talks after a difficult share price stretch, with...
